medialive.channel.inputsettings.CfnAbout:
Information about extracting content from the input and about handling the content.

The parent of this entity is InputAttachment.

medialive.channel.inputsettings.AudioSel.Description: Information about the specific audio to extract from the input.  The parent of this entity is InputSettings.

medialive.channel.inputsettings.CaptionS.Description: Information about the specific captions to extract from the input.

medialive.channel.inputsettings.DeblockF.Description: Enables or disables the deblock filter when filtering.

medialive.channel.inputsettings.DenoiseF.Description: Enables or disables the denoise filter when filtering.

medialive.channel.inputsettings.FilterSt.Description: Adjusts the magnitude of filtering from 1 (minimal) to 5 (strongest).

medialive.channel.inputsettings.InputFil.Description: Turns on the filter for this input. MPEG-2 inputs have the deblocking filter enabled by default. 1) auto - filtering is applied depending on input type/quality 2) disabled - no filtering is applied to the input 3) forced - filtering is applied regardless of the input type.

medialive.channel.inputsettings.NetworkI.Description: Information about how to connect to the upstream system.

medialive.channel.inputsettings.Scte35Pi.Description: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.

medialive.channel.inputsettings.Smpte203.Description: Specifies whether to extract applicable ancillary data from a SMPTE-2038 source in this input. Applicable data types are captions, timecode, AFD, and SCTE-104 messages. - PREFER: Extract from SMPTE-2038 if present in this input, otherwise extract from another source (if any). - IGNORE: Never extract any ancillary data from SMPTE-2038.

medialive.channel.inputsettings.SourceEn.Description: The loop input if it is a file.

medialive.channel.inputsettings.VideoSel.Description: Information about one video to extract from the input.
